stemHtml: One stage of an axial compressor in a gas turbine engine comprises:

options.a: a row of rotor blades followed by a row of stator vanes.
options.b: inlet guide vanes followed by a row of rotor blades and a row of stator vanes.
options.c: a row of inlet guide vanes followed by a row of rotor blades.
options.d: a row of rotor blades followed by a row of inlet guide vanes.
